testcase.name: test_get_preferences_has_channels

failure.message: AssertionError: assert ('channel_push' in {'daily_summary': False, 'document_expiry': True, 'expense_anomalies': False, 'leave_requests': False, ...} or None is not None) + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfab459ddd900>('channel_push') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfab459ddd900> = {'daily_summary': False, 'document_expiry': True, 'expense_anomalies': False, 'leave_requests': False, ...}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration48_new_features.py:167: in test_get_preferences_has_channels assert "channel_push" in data or data.get("channel_push") is not None E AssertionError: assert ('channel_push' in {'daily_summary': False, 'document_expiry': True, 'expense_anomalies': False, 'leave_requests': False, ...} or None is not None) E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfab459ddd900>('channel_push') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfab459ddd900> = {'daily_summary': False, 'document_expiry': True, 'expense_anomalies': False, 'leave_requests': False, ...}.get

testcase.name: test_trigger_invalid_report_type
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration48_new_features.py:316: in test_trigger_invalid_report_type assert response.status_code == 400 E assert 500 == 400 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code
